name: Chunk 1/34
text:

name: Chunk 2/34
text:
## Executive Summary  
FirstUK Bank maintains competitive, transparent pricing across all retail banking products. This guide shows all fees, charges, and interest rates effective January 15, 2026. Prices reviewed quarterly and updated as needed.  
---

name: Chunk 3/34
text:
# SMARTSAVER ACCOUNT (SAV-001)  
## Interest Rates  
**Effective:** 2026-01-15
**Rate Type:** Variable (reviewed monthly)
**Base Calculation:** Bank of England Base Rate + 2.5% Margin

name: Chunk 4/34
text:
### Interest Rate Tiers  
| Balance Tier | Annual Interest Rate (AER) | Annual Interest Rate (Gross) |
|---|---|---|
| £0–£10,000 | 4.50% | 4.50% |
| £10,001–£50,000 | 4.70% | 4.70% |
| £50,001+ | 4.80% | 4.80% |  
**Interest Accrual:** Monthly (calculated daily, paid on last business day of month)  
**Example:** £10,000 balance in Tier 1
- Monthly interest: £37.50 (= £10,000 × 4.50% ÷ 12)
- Annual interest: £450.00

name: Chunk 5/34
text:
### Variation Basis  
- **Review Frequency:** Monthly
- **Trigger:** Bank of England Base Rate changes
- **Basis:** BoE Base Rate + 2.5% Margin (fixed margin)
- **Notification:** Email alert when rate changes (customer can opt-in)
- **Effective Date:** Rate change effective 1st of following month

name: Chunk 6/34
text:
### Current BoE Base Rate: 4.0% (as of 2026-01-15)  
---

name: Chunk 7/34
text:
## Fees & Charges  
**Monthly Maintenance Fee:** £0.00
**Overdraft Facility:** Not available
**Minimum Opening Balance:** £1.00
**Maximum Balance:** Unlimited

name: Chunk 8/34
text:
### Transaction Fees  
| Transaction Type | Fee |
|---|---|
| ATM Withdrawal (UK) | £0.00 |
| ATM Withdrawal (International) | £2.50 |
| International Transfer | £5.00 |
| Domestic Transfer | £0.00 |
| Standing Order | £0.00 |
| Direct Debit | £0.00 |

name: Chunk 9/34
text:
### Card Fees  
| Service | Fee |
|---|---|
| Debit Card (Initial) | £0.00 |
| Card Replacement | £15.00 |
| Expedited Card Replacement (1–2 days) | £25.00 |
| Virtual Card Number (for online shopping) | £0.00 |

name: Chunk 10/34
text:
### Other Fees  
| Service | Fee |
|---|---|
| Account Closure | £0.00 |
| Statement Reprint | £0.00 |
| Dormancy Letter | £0.00 |
| Chequebook (if offered) | £0.00 |  
**Total Annual Cost (Typical Customer):** £0.00 (no fees)  
---

name: Chunk 11/34
text:
# SMARTSAVER PLUS ACCOUNT (SAV-002)  
## Interest Rates  
**Effective:** 2026-01-15
**Rate Type:** Variable (reviewed monthly)
**Base Calculation:** Bank of England Base Rate + 2.75% Margin
**Minimum Balance for this Rate:** £50,001

name: Chunk 12/34
text:
### Interest Rate Tier  
| Balance | Annual Interest Rate (AER) |
|---|---|
| All balances | 5.25% |  
**Interest Accrual:** Monthly
**Example:** £100,000 balance
- Monthly interest: £437.50 (= £100,000 × 5.25% ÷ 12)
- Annual interest: £5,250.00

name: Chunk 13/34
text:
## Fees & Charges  
**Premium Account Fee:** £0.00 (offset by higher rates)
**All Other Fees:** Same as SmartSaver Account

name: Chunk 14/34
text:
### Value-Added Services (Included)  
- Dedicated relationship manager (phone support)
- Priority customer service (24-hour response)
- Annual financial planning review
- Waived international transfer fees  
---

name: Chunk 15/34
text:
# CURRENT ACCOUNT (CURR-001)  
## Interest Rates  
**Savings Interest:** £0.00 (no interest on current account)
**Overdraft Interest Rate (if Arranged):** 15.00% AER

name: Chunk 16/34
text:
### Overdraft Example  
**Arranged Overdraft of £1,000 at 15%:**
- Daily interest: £0.41
- Monthly interest: £12.50
- Annual interest: £150.00  
**Unarranged Overdraft:** 25.00% AER + £5 daily fee (not recommended)  
---

name: Chunk 17/34
text:
## Fees & Charges  
**Monthly Account Fee:** £0.00
**Overdraft Arrangement Fee:** £0.00 (first time)

name: Chunk 18/34
text:
### Transaction Fees  
| Transaction | Fee |
|---|---|
| Domestic Transfer | £0.00 |
| International Transfer | £8.00 |
| ATM Withdrawal (UK) | £0.00 |
| ATM Withdrawal (International) | £3.00 |
| Overdraft Interest (see above) | 15.00% AER |
| Unarranged Overdraft | 25.00% AER + £5/day |

name: Chunk 19/34
text:
### Card Fees  
Same as SmartSaver Account (see above)  
**Total Annual Cost (No Overdraft Use):** £0.00
**Total Annual Cost (With £2,000 Overdraft Usage):** ~£300 (interest only)  
---

name: Chunk 20/34
text:
# MORTGAGE PRODUCT (MORT-001)  
## Interest Rates  
**Rate Options:**
- Fixed Rate 2 Year
- Fixed Rate 5 Year
- Variable Rate (tracker)

name: Chunk 21/34
text:
### Current Mortgage Rates (2026-01-15)  
| Product | Loan-to-Value (LTV) | Fixed 2-Yr | Fixed 5-Yr | Variable |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Residential Mortgage | <60% LTV | 4.50% | 5.00% | Base + 1.5% |
| Residential Mortgage | 60–80% LTV | 4.75% | 5.25% | Base + 1.75% |
| Residential Mortgage | 80%+ LTV | 5.25% | 5.75% | Base + 2.25% |  
**Current Variable Rate Example (at BoE Base 4.0%):** 5.50% (Base 4.0% + 1.5% margin)

name: Chunk 22/34
text:
### Rate Variation (Fixed Rate Period)  
**Fixed Rate 2-Year:** Fixed for 2 years, then re-fixed
**Fixed Rate 5-Year:** Fixed for 5 years, then re-fixed
**Early Repayment Fee (Fixed Rate):** Typically 1–3% of outstanding balance (if early repayment during fixed period)  
---

name: Chunk 23/34
text:
## Mortgage Fees  
| Fee Type | Amount |
|---|---|
| Arrangement Fee | Included (no separate fee) |
| Valuation Fee | Included (FirstUK Bank covers) |
| Legal Fees (Conveyancing) | Customer's cost (~£1,200–£2,000) |
| Mortgage Protection Insurance | Optional, varies by provider |
| Booking Fee (to lock rate) | £0.00 |

name: Chunk 24/34
text:
### Monthly Payment Example  
**Mortgage: £200,000 at 5.00% Fixed, 25-year term**  
| Period | Monthly Payment |
|---|---|
| First 2 years | £1,193.31 |
| Year 3+ (if re-fixed at 5.50%) | £1,267.99 |  
**Note:** Fixed rate protects against rate rises during term  
---

name: Chunk 25/34
text:
# DEBIT CARD (CARD-001)  
## Card Fees  
**Card Type:** Visa Debit
**Annual Fee:** £0.00
**Replacement Fee:** £15.00 (or £25.00 for expedited 1–2 days)

name: Chunk 26/34
text:
## Transaction Costs  
| Transaction | Cost | Limits |
|---|---|---|
| UK ATM Withdrawal | £0.00 | £500/day |
| International ATM | £2.50 per withdrawal | £300/day |
| Contactless Payment | £0.00 | £100 per transaction |
| Online Purchase | £0.00 | Visa limit |
| Point of Sale | £0.00 | No limit |
| International Purchase | £0.00 | ~2% Visa exchange rate |  
**Monthly Cost (Typical User):** £0.00 (no fees if no international use)  
---

name: Chunk 27/34
text:

| Product | FirstUK | Competitor A | Competitor B |
|---|---|---|---|
| Interest Rate (Tier 1: <£10k) | 4.50% | 4.25% | 4.00% |
| Monthly Fee | £0 | £0 | £0 |
| Min. Opening Balance | £1 | £100 | £500 |
| **Verdict** | ✅ **Most Competitive** | Mid-range | Lower rate |

name: Chunk 28/34
text:
### Current Account vs. Competitors  
| Product | FirstUK | Competitor A | Competitor B |
|---|---|---|---|
| Monthly Fee | £0 | £15 | £0 |
| Overdraft Rate | 15% | 18% | 16% |
| ATM Fee (UK) | £0 | £0 | £1.50 |
| **Verdict** | ✅ **Best for No Fee** | Expensive | Higher ATM fees |  
---

name: Chunk 29/34
text:
# PRICING PHILOSOPHY  
FirstUK Bank aims for **transparency and competitiveness:**  
- ✅ **No Hidden Fees:** All charges clearly stated
- ✅ **Competitive Rates:** Match or beat market for key products
- ✅ **Clear Communication:** Customers understand their costs
- ✅ **Regular Review:** Quarterly pricing review to stay competitive  
---

name: Chunk 30/34
text:
# REVIEW SCHEDULE  
**Effective Date:** 2026-01-15
**Next Scheduled Review:** 2026-04-15
**Quarterly Reviews:** As market conditions change
**Rate Changes:** Monthly (for variable rates tied to BoE)  
---

name: Chunk 31/34
text:
# REGULATORY DISCLOSURES  
**Interest Paid:** Gross (no tax deducted). Customers must report to HMRC if liable.  
**Annual Percentage Rate (APR):**
- SmartSaver: 4.50%–4.80% (variable, tier-dependent)
- Mortgage: 5.00%–5.75% (varies by product/LTV)  
**PPI Insurance:** Not included (optional add-on available for mortgages)  
---

name: Chunk 32/34
text:
# CUSTOMER RESOURCES  
- **Online Rate Calculator:** www.firstuk.bank/rates
- **Product Comparison Tool:** www.firstuk.bank/compare
- **FAQs:** www.firstuk.bank/faq
- **Customer Service:** 0800-555-2265  
---
